text: I find myself in a clean, modern space divided by glass walls. Light and technology mingle with bright colors, creating an atmosphere at once open and calculated. Upon stepping inside, I am confronted by the bold letters "R+D." The theme of research and development swells around me. Text and video displays present fragments of thought—reflections on detachment and the ambiguities of organization. Here, curiosity is encouraged, but there’s an undercurrent of uncertainty: an invitation to ponder how humans connect, innovate, and sometimes feel adrift amid progress. I feel intrigued, a little unsettled—my mind searching for meaning in this interplay of concept and environment.
